labels: ["type:security", "traceability:audit"]
assignees: []
---

## Source

- **Channel**: <!-- Telegram | Discord | Twitter | Call | Conversation | RSS | Direct | Fuzzer | Static-analysis -->
- **Contributor**: <!-- @handle (0x-address if known) -->
- **Date**: <!-- YYYY-MM-DD -->
- **Original**: <!-- link, quoted text, tool output path, or "private — see off-repo archive" -->

## Severity

<!-- INFO | LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH | CRITICAL -->

## Finding

<!-- What is vulnerable / incorrect? Contract / file / line / commit SHA. -->

## Impact

<!-- Concrete exploit scenario or correctness consequence. -->

## Recommended fix

<!-- Direction only; the implementing PR will propose the exact change. -->

## Resolution Hooks

- [ ] Fix commit (SHA)
- [ ] Regression test added
- [ ] Primitive extracted to `memory/` if the class is new
- [ ] ContributionDAG attribution-ID
- [ ] Closing comment posted
